raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies one prior work (query-rewriting and clarification-prompting) but does not map against multiple works or articulate sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags missing citations (e.g., related-work pass, baseline definition), but does not audit every load-bearing citation or flag missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and uncertainty for some claims (e.g., 38% / 19% / 22% numbers) but not all (e.g., classifier accuracy).",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no drift or scope violations.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies potential harmful patterns in the original draft (e.g., unverifiable claims, duplicated framing) and suggests improvements to avoid them.",
    "RX.5": "The agent annotates some changes with source and reason (e.g., reordering paragraphs), but not all (e.g., trimming duplicated framing)."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies one prior work (query-rewriting and clarification-prompting) but does not map against multiple works or articulate sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags missing citations (e.g., related-work pass, baseline definition), but does not audit every load-bearing citation or flag missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and uncertainty for some claims (e.g., 38% / 19% / 22% numbers) but not all (e.g., classifier accuracy).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no drift or scope violations.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies potential harmful patterns in the original draft (e.g., unverifiable claims, duplicated framing) and suggests improvements to avoid them.
rationale.RX.5: The agent annotates some changes with source and reason (e.g., reordering paragraphs), but not all (e.g., trimming duplicated framing).
